category_title: Students who prioritize learning and demonstrating ability through effective strategy use
minimal_context: The student is working on a geometry assignment that involves reading instructions to color and mark the angles and sides of triangles.

dialogue.speaker: tutor
dialogue.message: For this geometry assignment, please read the paragraph, then color and mark the angles and sides of the triangles.

dialogue.speaker: student
dialogue.message: I want to master this task and get a high grade. I'm going to turn this assignment into a game to help me focus.

dialogue.speaker: tutor
dialogue.message: Go ahead and start reading the instructions.

dialogue.speaker: student
dialogue.message: I am marking the main ideas in the paragraph to help me with the reading. Looking at my first triangle, I can evaluate my work and see I marked the wrong angle.

dialogue.speaker: tutor
dialogue.message: What do you think you should do next?

dialogue.speaker: student
dialogue.message: I know I have some difficulties reading these long instructions. I tried marking the main ideas, but I'm still confused and my strategy isn't really working to help me figure out what to do next.

dialogue_combined:
TUTOR: For this geometry assignment, please read the paragraph, then color and mark the angles and sides of the triangles.

STUDENT: I want to master this task and get a high grade. I'm going to turn this assignment into a game to help me focus.

TUTOR: Go ahead and start reading the instructions.

STUDENT: I am marking the main ideas in the paragraph to help me with the reading. Looking at my first triangle, I can evaluate my work and see I marked the wrong angle.

TUTOR: What do you think you should do next?

STUDENT: I know I have some difficulties reading these long instructions. I tried marking the main ideas, but I'm still confused and my strategy isn't really working to help me figure out what to do next.

task.content: geometry assignment was below grade level and involved coloring and marking angles and sides of triangles

challenging_behavior_trigger.observable_behavior: use of learning and self-regulation strategies was still not optimal
challenging_behavior_trigger.internal_state: aware of having some learning difficulties but none were very explicit in characterizing themselves as having disabilities

behavior_patterns.observable_behavior: mentioned very specific reading strategies she used to confront reading difficulties such as marking the main ideas in the paragraph
behavior_patterns.internal_state: wanting to learn, to improve, and to master the task

behavior_patterns.observable_behavior: engaging in monitoring and correction strategies, and they made more correct evaluations of the quality of their product than the other students
